channel.title: Redmi Note 13 NFC MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.209.0.VNHTWXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 13 NFC Taiwan
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 13 NFC Taiwan

Codename: sapphiren

Version: OS2.0.209.0.VNHTWXM | 15.0

Size: 6.0 GB

MD5: 721eba8f576364bad1272647a45d1aac

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to January 2026. Increased system security.
